series.title: Rajiv Street Files
series.description: Tiny bilingual Tamil-English micro-soaps designed for Shorts and same-day sequel loops.

episodes.title: Rain on Rajiv Street terrace
continuityTokens: Ananya found a hidden letter on the terrace.

beats.speaker: Ananya
beats.line: The lights are back. So who left this letter here?

beats.speaker: Karthik
beats.line: இது நம்ம வீட்டு எழுத்தே இல்ல... ஆனா பெயர் உன்னோடே இருக்கு.
beats.pronunciation: idhu namma veettu ezhuthe illa... aana peyar unnode irukku.

beats.speaker: Ananya
beats.line: If my name is on it, why is tonight’s date from next week?

choices.label: The neighbour forged the note to hide a drone video

beats.speaker: Ananya
beats.line: The lights are back. So who left this letter here?

beats.speaker: Karthik
beats.line: இது நம்ம வீட்டு எழுத்தே இல்ல... ஆனா பெயர் உன்னோடே இருக்கு.
beats.pronunciation: idhu namma veettu ezhuthe illa... aana peyar unnode irukku.

beats.speaker: Ananya
beats.line: If my name is on it, why is tonight’s date from next week?

choices.label: The neighbour forged it to hide a drone video

beats.speaker: Ananya
beats.line: The power just cut. Did you text him?

beats.speaker: Karthik
beats.line: அவன் மெசேஜ் அனுப்பல... ஆனா மேல சத்தம் கேட்டேன்.
beats.pronunciation: avan message anuppala... aana mela satham ketten.

beats.speaker: Ananya
beats.line: Wait. Whose footsteps are on the terrace?

choices.label: The neighbour’s drone reveals a secret
